_comment: Copy to config.json (gitignored) OR set as env vars. NEVER commit real values. The gate is read-only on-chain; the only secret is the RPC key and the gate's signing key.

_env.HELIUS_RPC_URL: read from process.env.HELIUS_RPC_URL — includes your Helius API key, never commit
_env.GATE_SIGNING_SECRET_KEY: read from process.env.GATE_SIGNING_SECRET_KEY — base58 ed25519 secret of the gate's verdict key, never commit. If unset, verdicts are returned unsigned.
_env.SECOND_RPC_URL: optional read from process.env.SECOND_RPC_URL — a second provider for fail-closed agreement checks (see honest failure modes)
